name: MetLife Stadium
description: Home of the NFL's New York Giants and Jets, MetLife Stadium will host the FIFA World Cup Final.

name: SoFi Stadium
description: The most expensive stadium ever built at $5.5 billion, SoFi Stadium is a marvel of modern architecture.

name: AT&T Stadium
description: Known as 'Jerry's World', AT&T Stadium features the world's largest domed structure.

name: Hard Rock Stadium
description: Home to the Miami Dolphins, Hard Rock Stadium has been transformed for the World Cup.

name: Estadio Azteca
description: The iconic Azteca Stadium has hosted two World Cup Finals and is one of football's most legendary venues.

name: Levi's Stadium
description: Home of the San Francisco 49ers, Levi's Stadium offers stunning views of Silicon Valley.

name: BMO Field
description: Canada's first major soccer-specific stadium, BMO Field will be expanded for World Cup 2026.

name: Gillette Stadium
description: Home of the New England Patriots and New England Revolution, located near Boston.

name: NRG Stadium
description: The retractable-roof NRG Stadium is home to the Houston Texans and previously hosted the Super Bowl.

name: Empower Field
description: Mile-high stadium offering stunning Rocky Mountain views and unique altitude challenges.

name: BC Place
description: BC Place features a retractable roof and hosted the 2010 Winter Olympics closing ceremony.

name: Lincoln Financial Field
description: Home to the Philadelphia Eagles, this stadium is located in South Philadelphia's sports complex.

name: Arrowhead Stadium
description: Known as one of the loudest stadiums in the world, Arrowhead is the home of the Kansas City Chiefs.

name: Estadio Akron
description: Home to Chivas de Guadalajara, Estadio Akron is known for its distinctive concentric circle design.

name: Estadio BBVA
description: Modern stadium with views of the Cerro de la Silla mountain, home to Club de Fútbol Monterrey.

name: Commonwealth Stadium
description: Canada's largest stadium by capacity, hosting World Cup matches in the heart of Alberta.
